---
title: "Resources & Interactive Tools"
---

Welcome to the resources page. Here you will find interactive simulations, visual tools, and materials I use for teaching Physics and Mathematics.

## Simulations / Animations

* [**Electric Field Lines Visualization**](/simulations/field_lines/index.html)  
    An interactive 3D simulation to explore electric fields and point charges. 
* [**How Linear Transformations transform Space**](/simulations/linear_transform/index.html) 
    See how a linear transformation rotates and stretches the 2-dimensional space in real time and how the eigen-directions won't budge.
    
---

*(More tools and booklets will be added here soon.)*
